comparisonPoints.render: Free-only card grid: web app, browser install, QRCode, home shortcut, privacy; no paid store names.

Mobile stacks hero, QR, cards, steps, and commitments without horizontal overflow.

intentionalAdditions: Sem conta, sem pagamento e sem formulário de dados pessoais.

remainingIntentionalDeviations: No Chrome Web Store, Google Play, Apple App Store, Microsoft, TikTok, or Mozilla store/public submission cards because current user rule excludes known paid or personal-registration channels.
